arts.ttl: Europa League | FC Twente v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the UEFA Europa League group stage reaches its midway point, FC Twente prepares to host Lazio at De Grolsch Veste on Thursday evening. This match pits the undefeated but winless Dutch side against the group leaders from Italy in what promises to be an intriguing encounter. FC Twente, despite not securing a victory, have shown remarkable resilience in their Europa League campaign so far. They’ve managed to hold their own against formidable opponents, drawing 1-1 with both Manchester United at Old Trafford and Fenerbahçe at home. These results, while not ideal, demonstrate Twente’s ability to compete at this level. The post Europa League | FC Twente v Lazio: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lazio’s Romagnoli Suspended for One Match After Red Card Against Juventus
Lazio Defender Receives One-Match Ban for His Dismissal Against Juventus
arts.sum: Lazio defender Alessio Romagnoli has been slapped with a one-match ban after receiving his marching orders in last weekend’s Serie A clash against Juventus, reports Il Corriere dello Sport. The 29-year-old caught the leg of his former Milan teammate Pierre Kalulu with a desperate sliding tackle as the latter was heading towards Ivan Provedel’s goal.
